spLeakage: Detect and Quantify Spatial Information Leakage

Source: R/spLeakage-package.R
spLeakage-package.Rd

Diagnostic tools for spatial information leakage in predictive modelling. spLeakage audits a train/test split or modelling workflow, quantifies the leakage and the optimism it induces, and recommends an appropriate validation strategy for the user's sampling design and prediction target.

Details

See docs/VISION.md for the methodology and roadmap. The package is in early development; no functions are exported yet (phase P0).

See also
